Our Approach

Professional. Principled. Personal.

Baig Law Associates was founded to provide individuals, families, and businesses with principled, effective legal representation. We understand legal matters are personal, stressful, and consequential.

We approach every case with the care and dedication it deserves, combining thorough legal preparation with genuine commitment to our clients' outcomes.

✓
Integrity — Honest assessments at all times.
✓
Confidentiality — All communications are privileged.
✓
Competence — We take only cases we can handle well.
✓
Transparency — No hidden fees, no surprises.
Our Values

Guided by Ethics

Integrity

Honest assessments always. You deserve accurate information to make informed decisions about your matter.

Confidentiality

All communications privileged. We never share your information without explicit consent.

Competence

We take only cases we are genuinely equipped to handle and prepare thoroughly for each matter.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Answers to questions clients commonly ask before engaging our firm.

Questions

Have a Question?

If you don't find the answer here, reach out directly. We are happy to discuss your situation.

💬 WhatsApp Us
01 How do I book a consultation?
▾
You can book by calling our office, sending a WhatsApp message, or using the contact form on this website. We offer in-person consultations in Lahore and remote consultations for overseas clients.
02 Are consultations confidential?
▾
Yes. Every consultation is strictly confidential. All communications are protected by professional legal ethics obligations. You can speak freely about your matter.
03 What is your fee structure?
▾
Our fees depend on the nature and complexity of your matter. We are transparent about costs from the outset — all fees are explained clearly during the initial consultation. No hidden charges.
04 Can you assist overseas Pakistanis?
▾
Yes. We regularly assist overseas Pakistanis with property disputes, inheritance, family law, and other matters via WhatsApp, email, and video call. No need to travel for initial consultation.
05 Do you handle urgent bail applications?
▾
Yes. Contact us immediately by phone or WhatsApp for urgent matters — bail applications, emergency injunctions, and other time-sensitive proceedings.
06 Which courts do you appear in?
▾
We appear in District Courts, Sessions Courts, the Lahore High Court, and various tribunals across Lahore and Punjab. For Supreme Court matters, we work in association with senior counsel.
07 What documents should I bring?
▾
Bring any relevant documents — court notices, agreements, property papers, FIR copies, correspondence. Even with limited documents, our team can advise you on next steps.
08 How long does a case take?
▾
Case duration depends on complexity, the court's schedule, and other factors. We will give you a realistic timeline assessment during the case evaluation stage.

📰 News Articles
Article 1
📷
🔍 SEO Setup Guide

✅ Already done in your site:

  • Meta title & description
  • Open Graph tags (WhatsApp/Facebook preview)
  • Twitter Card tags
  • Schema.org structured data (LegalService)
  • sitemap.xml file
  • robots.txt file
  • FAQ Schema (helps Google FAQ rich results)

Step 1: Google Search Console

Go to search.google.com/search-console → Add Property → URL prefix → Copy the HTML meta tag

Step 2: Bing Webmaster Tools

Go to bing.com/webmasters → Add Site → HTML Meta Tag → copy content value

Step 3: Google My Business

Go to business.google.com → Create profile → Add your firm details, photos, and working hours. This makes you appear in Google Maps and local search.

Open Google Business →

Step 4: Submit Sitemap

In Google Search Console → Sitemaps → Enter: sitemap.xml → Submit

Step 5: IndexNow (Instant Bing indexing)

Go to bing.com/indexnow → Get API key → Add to your site's HTML head. Your site will be indexed within hours instead of weeks.

🔑 Change Admin Password

After changing the password, open the HTML file and update the line:
const ADMIN_PASS = 'your_new_password';

Current credentials:
Username: admin
Password: baiglaw2025

✅ Copied! Paste in your HTML file to update.

💾 Save Changes = preview in this browser only.
📥 Download Updated Website File = saves an updated index.html — upload/replace this file on your hosting (cPanel/FTP) to make changes live for everyone.

✅ Downloaded! Now upload this index.html to your hosting to go live.
